_comment: BP Doctor — Custom Rules Example. Copy this file to YourProject/Saved/BPDoctor/CustomRules.json and customize.
_docs: Rule types: banned_function, banned_node, required_node, node_limit. Rules appear alongside the 34 built-in checks.

rules.name: Ban GetAllActorsOfClass
rules.description: GetAllActorsOfClass iterates the entire actor list. Use tags or cached references instead.
rules.why_it_matters: With 50+ actors calling this per frame, FPS drops significantly. Use Actor Tags or store references in BeginPlay.
rules.beginner_tip: This function searches EVERY actor in the level every time it runs. Store the result in a variable instead of calling it repeatedly.

rules.name: Max 3 Timelines Per BP
rules.description: Blueprint exceeds the recommended Timeline limit.
rules.why_it_matters: Each Timeline creates a hidden component that ticks every frame. Multiple Timelines multiply this hidden cost.
rules.beginner_tip: Consider merging Timelines or using Lerp with a Timer for simple animations.

rules.name: Require Slot Node in AnimBPs
rules.description: AnimBP has no Slot node. Montages will not play without one.
rules.why_it_matters: PlayMontage silently fails if the AnimBP has no Slot node. This is the #1 AnimBP forum question.
rules.beginner_tip: Add an AnimSlot node to your AnimGraph and connect it to your pose chain. Then montages will work.

rules.name: Ban Delay Nodes
rules.description: Delay node found. Consider using Timers for more control over timing.
rules.why_it_matters: Delay nodes are simple but hard to cancel and can cause bugs when the owning actor is destroyed mid-delay.
rules.beginner_tip: The Delay node pauses execution but can cause issues if the actor is destroyed while waiting. Use Set Timer by Event for safer timing.
